— · — · Singapore

Suntec City office towers, Marina Centre. Credit: TK Real Estate.

Latest Transactions URA REALIS · Industrial · Office · Freehold · Strata · Weekly

Weekly URA REALIS Updates — Week of 15 June 2026: Fujifilm Building Sells for S$71M, Suntec Tower Three Office Trades at S$3,398 PSF; Factories Lead Volume; S$152.9M Across 47 Commercial & Industrial Caveats

The latest URA REALIS release brings 47 commercial and industrial caveats worth S$152.9 million — led by the freehold Fujifilm Building on New Industrial Road at S$71.0 million, and a high-floor Suntec Tower Three office unit at S$3,398 per square foot (psf). Factories led the count (31 of the 47), while retail printed the week's highest psf.

19 June 2026 · 1000 words · 6 min read
Read full story →

The Dashboard

Beyond the newsroom: search all commercial transactions in Singapore, access the full S-REIT & developer asset directory — filter by entity, date, segment. Free with signup.

More from this week

Updated 19 June 2026

2 Serangoon North (Ban Teck Han Building), Singapore — one of Mapletree Logistics Trust’s 44 Singapore assets, revalued to S$67.7 million in FY25/26. Credit: TK Real Estate.

REIT

Mapletree Logistics Trust FY25/26: Headline DPU Falls 9.8% To 7.262 Cents On The End Of Divestment-Gain Distributions, But Core Operating DPU Is Down Only 3.4% As Singapore Revenue Rises 5.2% Against A 13.3% China Slide

Mapletree Logistics Trust (SGX: M44U) closed FY25/26 with distribution per unit of 7.262 Singapore cents, down 9.8% — a number that looks worse than the business behind it. Strip out the one-off divestment gains and operating DPU was down just 3.4%.

19 Jun 2026 · 4 min read

Fairway, Crawley, Perth — artist’s render. Credit: DMG Architecture / Centurion.

Developer

Centurion Takes a 25% Stake in a c.182-Bed Perth Student-Housing Development at Fairway for AUD250,000 — Its Second Perth PBSA, EPIISOD-Operated and an Interested-Person Transaction

Centurion Corporation (SGX:OU8) has subscribed for a 25% stake in a c.182-bed PBSA at Fairway, Perth for AUD250,000 (S$225,475) — its second Perth scheme. Real group exposure runs to ~AUD16.7 million once a corporate guarantee and shareholder loans are counted, and the project is 75% owned by Centurion’s controlling shareholder, making it an interested-person transaction.

17 Jun 2026 · 4 min read

Queensway House, East Kilbride. Credit: Elite UK REIT.

REIT Acquisition

Elite UK REIT: £31.9M Acquisition of Five UK Government-Leased Assets + £19.0M Lindsay House PBSA — WALE Jumps to 7.6 Years from 2.4, HMRC Joins as New Tenant

Elite UK REIT (SGX:MXNU) is proposing to buy five UK government-leased properties for £31.9 million and convert vacant Lindsay House, Dundee into its first 170-bed student-housing asset for £19.0 million — a £53.4 million programme, 1.3% DPU accretive, needing an EGM vote in 3Q 2026.

16 Jun 2026 · 5 min read

Recent coverage

June 2026

SBF Center, 160 Robinson Road, Singapore. Credit: TK Real Estate.

Transactions

Weekly URA REALIS — Week of 8 June 2026: Serangoon Garden Shophouse Quadruples to S$15M; S$130M Across 56 Caveats

The latest URA REALIS release brings 56 commercial and industrial caveats worth S$130.0 million — led by a 999-year Serangoon Garden shophouse that quadrupled to S$15.0 million over 21 years, while short 30-year leaseholds and CBD office strata gave ground.

13 Jun 2026 · 6 min read

Siloam Sriwijaya, Palembang. Credit: First REIT.

Healthcare

First REIT EGM 23 June: S$471.5M Indonesia Divestment Goes to the Vote

First REIT has convened an EGM for 23 June 2026 to vote on the S$471.5 million divestment of its entire Indonesia portfolio. Pro-forma gearing collapses from 42.1% to 16.7%, with ~S$18.8M of annual interest savings.

11 Jun 2026 · 5 min read

Starvia by Y Suites on Fortress Hill, Hong Kong. Render: Y Suites

Developer

Wee Hur’s Hong Kong Week: A Student-Housing Platform Built in Two Deals

In a single week, SGX-listed Wee Hur announced two Hong Kong student-housing deals — a 246-bed operating asset on a master lease and a wholly-owned Kowloon building it will convert into ~500 beds by 2028 — funded by last year’s A$1.6 billion Australian PBSA exit.

10 Jun 2026 · 4 min read

3 Tai Seng Drive. Credit: CapitaLand Ascendas REIT.

Industrial

The Singapore Industrial REIT Scorecard: Where the Eight Names Stand

Eight SGX-listed REITs own industrial or logistics property in Singapore — from CapitaLand Ascendas at S$12.5 billion to Alpha Integrated at S$0.5 billion. Read together, their latest results describe a sub-sector tight at home and uneven abroad.

8 Jun 2026 · 5 min read

108 Robinson Road. Credit: TK Real Estate.

Transactions

Weekly URA Realis Updates — Week of 1 June 2026: PGIM’s Final Floor at 108 Robinson Road Sold for S$16.1M

The latest URA Realis release brings 13 commercial caveats totalling S$34.2 million — led by the third-floor office at 108 Robinson Road, the last strata lot in PGIM Real Estate’s floor-by-floor exit.

6 Jun 2026 · 5 min read

351 Braddell Road. Credit: UI Boustead REIT.

REIT IPO

UI Boustead REIT Closes Two Sponsor-Backed Co-Investments In Its First 70 Days

UI Boustead REIT (SGX:UIBU) listed on 12 March 2026 as the first SGX Mainboard and REIT IPO of the year, raising roughly S$973.6 million for a 23-asset, S$1.9 billion industrial and logistics portfolio.

4 Jun 2026 · 5 min read

Great Hills Plaza, Austin, Texas — one of KORE US REIT's 13 freehold US office assets. Credit: KORE US REIT.

REIT Results

KORE US REIT 1Q 2026: Adjusted NPI +15.9% To US$23.4M, Distributable Income +4.3%, Occupancy Eases To 85.1% On A Known Westpark Vacate

KORE's first operational update under its new name delivered double-digit NPI growth and a stronger balance sheet, but headline occupancy slipped on a single large Redmond move-out the manager is already working to backfill.

18 Apr 2026 · 3 min read

Stay informed

See setup instructions below ↓
Company Unit Industry (SSIC) Type Status UEN Reg. Date
💡 Prospecting Intelligence
Manual Address Lookup
-- 1. Create table in Supabase SQL editor
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tenant_registry (
  uen TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  entity_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  street_name TEXT,
  blk_no TEXT,
  unit_no TEXT,
  postal_code TEXT,
  entity_type TEXT,
  entity_status TEXT,
  primary_ssic_code TEXT,
  primary_ssic_desc TEXT,
  reg_date DATE,
  last_updated TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE INDEX idx_tenant_street ON tenant_registry(street_name, blk_no);
CREATE INDEX idx_tenant_postal ON tenant_registry(postal_code);
-- 2. Download ACRA CSV from data.gov.sg
-- https://data.gov.sg/datasets/d_3f960c10fed6145404ca7b821f263b87/view
-- Filter: street_name IS NOT NULL (industrial addresses)
-- 3. Enable Row Level Security + public read policy
ALTER TABLE tenant_registry ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
CREATE POLICY "public_read" ON tenant_registry FOR SELECT USING (true);
-- 4. Monthly refresh (run via cron or Supabase scheduled function)
-- Truncate + re-import from latest ACRA CSV download

ATLAS AI
Live C&I Market Data

Before you continue —
ATLAS AI answers questions using Singapore commercial & industrial transaction data from URA REALIS (1995–2026). It queries live data and uses AI to interpret results.

This is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial, investment, or legal advice. Data reflects URA caveated transactions and may not capture all market activity.
